response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct song segments in the video based on the performer's transition and on-screen text. 2. Song 1 (00:00-04:08): Identified title 'アンバランスなKissをして' and composer Hiro Takahashi from on-screen text. Searched for official Japanese lyrics and found them. 3. Song 2 (04:08-end): Identified title 'GHOST SWEEPER' and composer Toshiyuki Ohmori from on-screen text. Searched for official Japanese lyrics, confirmed title as an opening theme from 'Ghost Sweeper Mikami', and found lyrics in Japanese and Romaji. 4. Compiled both sets of lyrics and structured the JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two full vocal performances by virtual performers Tsunomaki Watame, Nekomata Okayu, and Takane Lui. The video is part of the 'Tsunomaki Watame Birthday Festival 2026' event and features covers of 'Unbalanced na Kiss wo Shite' and 'GHOST SWEEPER'.

scenes.description: The first song performance, 'Unbalanced na Kiss wo Shite'. Performers dance and sing on a futuristic stage. On-screen text credits lyricist Hiroshi Yamada and composer Hiro Takahashi.
scenes.performer_in_video: Tsunomaki Watame, Nekomata Okayu, Takane Lui

泣いている 泣いている

誰を呼んでいるの 消えた恋の背中

君の窓を叩くから

ただ、君を 君を強く
抱いてた
アンバランスなKissを交わして

君の涙も 哀しい嘘も
僕の心に
眠れ

昨日へのMerry-go-round 君を運んでゆく
止めたくて 止めたくて
僕は鍵を探してる
崩れ落ちそうな 空を支えて
ひとり立ち尽くす
ただ、君の 君の側に
いたいよ

痛い
ただ、君の 君の側に
いたいよ

僕の心に
眠れ

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The reflection of you in the broken mirror
Crying, crying
Finger tracing the slender moon
Who are you calling out to? The back of a lost love
Again and again, again and again
Because I'll knock on your window
Driven by the acceleration of the night
As if the thread is about to snap
Just, I was holding you, you so strongly
Exchange an unbalanced kiss
And draw near to love
May your tears and sad lies
Sleep in my heart

Turning the merry-go-round to yesterday, carrying you away
I want to stop it, I want to stop it
I'm searching for the key
Supporting the sky that looks about to collapse
I stand still alone
Just, I want to be by your, your side
Written in an unbalanced kiss, our two-person scenario
Even if it's not strong enough to be called love
Everything about you is painful
Just, I want to be by your, your side
Exchange an unbalanced kiss
And draw near to love
May your tears and sad lies
Sleep in my heart
Until your heart calls out to me
Until the day we can hold each other tight
